vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

generated_parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine

verify.value: All required fields are present.
verify.rule: Ensure all necessary fields are included in the output.
Ensure the mass estimate is realistic and matches the design.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are present in part_tree/geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Ensure all P0 features are mapped to geometry operations.

verify.value: All interfaces have reciprocal definitions.
verify.rule: Ensure interfaces are defined with matching attributes in both subsystems.

verify.value: Visible locking evidence and preload intent for critical joints.
verify.rule: Critical joints must have visible locking or preload evidence.
Include fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces for downstream analysis.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to high heat dissipation from avionics bay.
risk.mit: Implement heat sinks and thermal management solutions.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient service access for avionics bay maintenance.
risk.mit: Ensure service access panels are easily removable and provide adequate access.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure at wing spar socket under high load.
risk.mit: Strengthen the wing spar socket design and perform load testing.

risk.desc: Risk of improper fit and clearance for tilt mechanism rotation.
risk.mit: Review and adjust the clearance and fit for the tilt mechanism.

risk.desc: Risk of dimensional inaccuracy due to manufacturing process limitations.
risk.mit: Use precise manufacturing techniques and perform quality checks.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

physics_paths.path: Wing spar loads from nacelle tilt servos into fuselage spine
Airflow around fuselage spine and through avionics bay
Heat dissipation from avionics bay to fuselage exterior
Tilt mechanism rotation clearance for rotor nacelles
Atmospheric pressure on external fuselage surface
Cable harness routing from wing spar to avionics bay
Service access for avionics bay maintenance

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection of fit and finish

verification_focus: Structural integrity of wing spar socket
Service access for avionics bay maintenance
Clearance and fit of tilt mechanism rotation clearance

verify.rule: Interfaces must have reciprocal naming and matching DOF/clearance.

verify.value: All critical joints have visible locking evidence and torque/preload intent.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to high temperature differential between wing spar and ambient air.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management strategies such as heat sinks and thermal barriers.

risk.desc: Risk of improper alignment during assembly due to complex interface requirements.
risk.mit: Provide detailed alignment jigs and clear assembly instructions.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient clearance in critical interfaces leading to jamming or binding.
risk.mit: Ensure all critical interfaces have adequate clearance and fit language.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure due to overloading in extreme flight conditions.
risk.mit: Conduct rigorous load testing and stress analysis before finalizing design.

risk.desc: Risk of service access issues due to tight spaces and complex geometry.
risk.mit: Ensure all service access points are easily accessible and clearly marked.

verify.rule: All required fields in the schema are present and valid.
The mass_est_g field is a numeric grams value.
Each internal_feature_target appears as a part_tree child and is referenced by geometry_ops.
Each interface has a named exact neighboring subsystem label and includes connection_type, DOF, clearance_mm, and required_feature.
Critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.
Boundary_conditions object includes fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.

risk.desc: The mass estimate of 3500g may be higher than expected for a tiltrotor VTOL hybrid subsystem.
risk.mit: Review the material selection and manufacturing process to optimize weight.

Spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

risk.mit: Increase clearance between ruddervator and adjacent structures.

risk.desc: Potential for cable strain or damage due to unsupported exits.
risk.mit: Ensure all cable exits have strain relief geometry and follow minimum bend radius guidelines.

risk.desc: Risk of mis-mating connectors without proper keying or labeling.
risk.mit: Ensure all connectors are keyed or labeled to prevent mis-mating.

risk.desc: Risk of improper assembly sequence leading to misalignment.
